content: Papr: thin layer over official MongoDB Node.js driver. Schema defined as plain object builders: schema({ name: types.string({ required: true }) }). Uses MongoDB JSON Schema server-side validation. Strong TypeScript types including projection types. Deliberately excludes: hooks/middleware, virtual fields, population/references, query builder. Native driver access is inherent — Papr is nearly transparent to the driver. v11: eliminated permissive Document interface for strict typed queries. No recursive types. Philosophy: type safety + validation without ODM abstraction overhead. Users who know the raw driver API already know Papr.
